# Load the quranic_verses.json file and search for the ayah text.
import json, re, os, sys, math, difflib

qpath = '/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json'
hpath = '/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json'

with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)

len(q)

target = "وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَوۡ كَانَ خَيۡرٗا مَّا سَبَقُونَآ إِلَيۡهِۚ وَإِذۡ لَمۡ يَهۡتَدُواْ بِهِۦ فَسَيَقُولُونَ هَٰذَآ إِفۡكٞ قَدِيمٞ"
# Search exact
matches = [entry for entry in q if entry['ayah_text']==target]
len(matches), matches[:1]

import unicodedata

# normalization function
def normalize_ar(text):
    # convert to NFC
    text = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640', '')  # tatweel
    # replace various alef forms with bare alef 'ا'
    text = re.sub('[إأآاٱٲٳٔ]', 'ا', text)
    # unify hamza on waw/yah? Already handled above.
    # remove tashkeel diacritics:  ًٌٍَُِّْٰۖۗۚ etc
    # list of Arabic diacritics
    diacritics = [
        '\u0610','\u0611','\u0612','\u0613','\u0614','\u0615','\u0616','\u0617','\u0618','\u0619','\u061A',
        '\u064B','\u064C','\u064D','\u064E','\u064F','\u0650','\u0651','\u0652','\u0653','\u0654','\u0655','\u0670',
        '\u06D6','\u06D7','\u06D8','\u06D9','\u06DA','\u06DB','\u06DC','\u06DF','\u06E0','\u06E1','\u06E2','\u06E3',
        '\u06E4','\u06E7','\u06E8','\u06EA','\u06EB','\u06EC','\u06ED','\u06EF','\u06F0','\u06F1','\u06F2','\u06F3'
    ]
    for d in diacritics:
        text = text.replace(d, '')
    # remove punctuation: Arabic and ascii punctuation
    punctuation = r"""!\"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\]^_`{|}~،؛؟«»…"""
    text = re.sub(f"[{re.escape(punctuation)}]", '', text)
    # collapse whitespace
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # lowercase (not necessary for Arabic but fine)
    text = text.lower()
    return text

target = "وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَوۡ كَانَ خَيۡرٗا مَّا سَبَقُونَآ إِلَيۡهِۚ وَإِذۡ لَمۡ يَهۡتَدُواْ بِهِۦ فَسَيَقُولُونَ هَٰذَآ إِفۡكٞ قَدِيمٞ"
tnorm = normalize_ar(target)
tnorm[:200], len(tnorm)
[(ch, hex(ord(ch))) for ch in target if not ch.isspace()][:200]

import unicodedata
def normalize_ar2(text):
    text = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640', '')
    # replace alef variants (including U+0671 'ٱ') with plain alef
    text = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671\u0627\u0672\u0673\u0674\u0675]', 'ا', text)
    # remove combining marks (category M) and punctuation and symbols; keep letters and numbers and spaces
    out_chars = []
    for ch in text:
        cat = unicodedata.category(ch)
        if ch.isspace():
            out_chars.append(' ')
        elif cat.startswith('L') or cat.startswith('N'):  # letters or numbers
            out_chars.append(ch)
        # else drop
    res = ''.join(out_chars)
    res = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', res).strip()
    res = res.lower()
    return res

tnorm = normalize_ar2(target)
tnorm, len(tnorm)
[(ch, hex(ord(ch)), unicodedata.name(ch, 'UNKNOWN'), unicodedata.category(ch)) for ch in tnorm]

# Precompute normalized forms for q
for entry in q[:5]:
    print(entry['ayah_text'], "->", normalize_ar2(entry['ayah_text']))

q_norm = []
for entry in q:
    q_norm.append((entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], normalize_ar2(entry['ayah_text'])))

# define token F1
def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    if not ta and not tb:
        return 1.0
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    common = 0
    # compute multiset overlap
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    for token in ca:
        common += min(ca[token], cb.get(token,0))
    prec = common / sum(ca.values())
    rec = common / sum(cb.values())
    if prec+rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1

# find best matches by token_f1
best = []
for surah_id, ayah_id, ayah_text, ayah_norm in q_norm:
    sim = token_f1(tnorm, ayah_norm)
    best.append((sim, surah_id, ayah_id, ayah_text, ayah_norm))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
best_sorted[:10]

# find the top match entry
top = best_sorted[0]
top
